creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Apparently the stage-qa phase, or lang/python, have been tightened up, causing a build failure of net/samba47 in poudriere under bulk -t. These are head and tail of the build log:

[00:00:01] =>> Building net/samba47

[00:00:02] maintained by: timur@FreeBSD.org
[00:00:02] Makefile ident:      $FreeBSD: head/net/samba47/Makefile 486043 2018-11-27 17:25:53Z timur $

[00:00:02] Host OSVERSION: 1200086
[00:00:02] Jail OSVERSION: 1200086

[00:00:02]
